"
Transforming lives through the science of pain — where precision meets compassion.
Dr. Dhivya Dilipkumar TMJ & Orofacial Pain Specialist · Co-Founder
26+ Years of Excellence
Our Philosophy

Where Advanced Science
Meets Compassionate Care

Dr. Dilip Dental Centre pioneered specialised orofacial pain treatment in India. Our integrative approach combines advanced diagnostics with evidence-based care — treating not just teeth, but the complete orofacial system.

With a team of 40+ specialists spanning dentistry, neurology, and physiotherapy, we bring world-class care to Chennai, Coimbatore, and soon Bangalore — all under one trusted name.

✦ Best TMJ & Orofacial Pain Centre in India
✦ Board-Certified & Accredited Hospital
✦ 99% Patient Satisfaction Rate
What We Treat

Our
Services

10 Specialisations

01

Sleep Dentistry

Comfortable, anxiety-free dental treatment while you rest in deep sedation.

02

Orofacial Pain

Comprehensive diagnosis and treatment of complex facial and jaw pain disorders.

03

TMJ Treatment

India's most advanced temporomandibular joint therapy and rehabilitation.

04

Migraine Management

Dentally-driven migraine relief through occlusal and neuromuscular interventions.

05

Dental Implants

Permanent, natural-looking tooth restoration using premium titanium implants.

06

Invisalign

Virtually invisible orthodontic aligners for a perfectly aligned smile.

07

Root Canal Therapy

Painless, precision endodontic care using rotary and laser-assisted techniques.

08

Teeth Whitening

Professional-grade whitening delivering a radiant, confident smile in one session.

09

Cosmetic Dentistry

Veneers, bonding, and smile makeovers crafted with an artist's eye.

10

Pediatric Dentistry

Gentle, child-friendly care building healthy dental habits from the very start.

The Specialists

Meet Our Doctors

DD

Dr. Dhivya Dilipkumar

TMJ & Orofacial Pain Specialist

MDS · 26+ Years Experience · Co-Founder

India's foremost orofacial pain specialist, leading the way in non-surgical TMJ and migraine management through advanced diagnostics.

Book with Dr. Dhivya →
DK

Dr. Dilip Kumar

Founder & Principal Dentist

BDS MDS · Senior Dental Surgeon · Co-Founder

A visionary dental surgeon whose patient-first philosophy built Dr. Dilip Dental Centre into one of South India's most trusted practices.

Book with Dr. Dilip →
40+

Our Full Team

Doctors & Nursing Staff

A multidisciplinary team of specialists — dentists, physiotherapists, neurologists, and dedicated nursing staff — united by a single purpose: your complete orofacial wellbeing.

Patient Stories

Dr. Dhivya completely resolved my 3-year TMJ pain in just 6 sessions. The difference is life-changing.

Our Locations

Chennai Open
GF-3, Vasanth Apartments,
Nolambur, Mogappair West,
Chennai – 600 037, Tamil Nadu
Hours Mon–Sat: 9AM–8PM  ·  Sun: 10AM–8PM
+91 9884 520 520
Coimbatore Open
988, Thadagam Main Road,
R.S. Puram,
Coimbatore – 641 002, Tamil Nadu
Hours Mon–Sat: 9AM–8PM  ·  Sun: 10AM–8PM
+91 9884 520 520

We're expanding to Karnataka, bringing our world-class orofacial pain expertise to Bangalore. Be the first to know when we open.
